queries.question: List all animation films and also list comedies that were released in 2021.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.Title 
FROM Films
WHERE Films.Genre = "Animation" OR Films.Genre = "Comedy" AND Films.Release_Year = 2021
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:Title ?title .
  ?films p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?films p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:Release_Year ?release_year_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Animation" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Comedy" && (STR(?release_year_w) = "2021" || STR(?release_year_w) = "2021.0"))))
}

queries.question: What animation films were released in 2021 and what comedies were released in the same year?
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.Title 
FROM Films
WHERE (Films.Genre = "Animation" OR Films.Genre = "Comedy") AND Films.Release_Year = 2021
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?films a :Films .
  ?films p:Title ?title .
  ?films p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?films p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:Release_Year ?release_year_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Animation" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Comedy")) && (STR(?release_year_w) = "2021" || STR(?release_year_w) = "2021.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show animation films and comedy films released in 2021.
